title: coffea sessiliflora subsp. sessiliflora
intro: Coffea sessiliflora subsp. sessiliflora, also known as the green coffee or coffee shrub, is a plant species within the coffee family (Rubiaceae) that is native to Madagascar and the Comoros Islands. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and improve blood circulation. The health benefits of Coffea sessiliflora subsp. sessiliflora include reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and potentially aiding in weight loss. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits.
